org.projecthusky.fhir.vacd.ch.common.exceptions
 
  • Classes in org.projecthusky.fhir.core.ch.exceptions used by org.projecthusky.fhir.core.ch.resource.extension.r4
    Class
    Description
    InvalidContentException
    An exception thrown when trying to read, parse or validate an content (e.g. a document) that is invalid regarding its specification.
